channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: Celebrating the American Dream
item.description: As the U.S. approaches its 250th anniversary, we honor American heroes and traditions. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares...

item.title: Blanche faces tough questions on DOJ controversies during AG confirmation
item.description: Blanche is expected to need support from all Judiciary Committee Republicans.

item.title: Ebola cases surpass 2,000 in Congo, with 754 deaths confirmed
item.description: Official data released overnight shows 2,011 confirmed Ebola cases in Congo, including 754 deaths, as authorities describe...

item.title: 26 Meta employees sue over alleged AI-driven layoffs targeting leave-takers
item.description: The lawsuit claims Meta used AI to select workers for layoffs, disproportionately affecting those on medical, parental, or other leave.
